## What Broke?

<!-- A clear description of the bug. "It doesn't work" is not a bug report, it's a cry for help. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

<!-- How do we make it happen? If we can't reproduce it, we can't fix it. -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See '...'

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What *should* have happened? -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What *did* happen instead? -->

## Screenshots / Errors

<!-- Console errors, screenshots, stack traces — anything that helps. -->

## Environment

- **Browser**: (Chrome 125, Firefox 128, Safari 18, etc.)
- **OS**: (Windows, macOS, Linux, the metaverse)
- **Wallet**: (Phantom, MetaMask, none)
- **Network**: (Mainnet, Devnet, Testnet)
- **Mobile**: Yes / No

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else that might be relevant. When did it start? Does it happen every time? -->
